name: Proton Sheets
description: End-to-end encrypted online spreadsheet editor by Proton AG, integrated into Proton Drive.

years.notes: Launched December 4, 2025. Icon-only badge mark (sheets-badge.svg) sourced from official Proton CDN via proton.me/drive/sheets page navigation. Green radial gradient (#1B854C → #26DA79) on white rounded-rect background with spreadsheet plus/cross symbol.
